mission.title: opentofu: Retain resources on destroy
mission.description: Retain resources on destroy. Requested by 16+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
steps.description:
### Use Cases

When creating certain resources that we need to keep when deleting the environment, I don't want to do any manual actions.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Retain resources on destroy
Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "Retain resources on destroy" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Please make sure you go through the checklist below. If your PR does not meet all requirements, please file it
as a draft PR. Core team members will only review your PR once it meets all the requirements below (unless your
change is something as trivial as a typo fix).

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
